heading: Required Roles
body:
To [insert](atlas-ui-insert-documents), [edit](atlas-ui-edit-document),
or [delete documents](atlas-ui-delete-document), you must have been
granted access through one of the following roles:

- [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) or [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>)

- [Project Data Access Admin](<Project Data Access Admin>)

- [Project Data Access Read/Write](<Project Data Access Read/Write>)
